body_transformation: Scyther's wings now feature smooth, iridescent scales in deep ocean blue with subtle aquamarine highlights along the curved edges, maintaining their original insectoid shape. The curled tail tip transforms into a sleek, finned structure with pearly white edges and seafoam green accents, preserving the spiral form. Pale cream head and leg accents shift to a soft aquamarine hue, while the body texture adopts a wet, glistening scale pattern with faint gill slits visible along the neck. The previously translucent membranes of the wings now have a water-like clarity, reflecting light like a deep sea surface.
signature_feature: Tail fin: pearly white with seafoam green edging and a flowing, wave-like ripple texture.
